title: cissampelos pareira subsp. owariensis
intro: Cissampelos pareira subsp. owariensis is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, belonging to the family Menispermaceae. It is commonly known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and diuretic properties, which have been associated with several health benefits, including the reduction of blood pressure, relief from rheumatic pain, and improved kidney function. Cissampelos pareira subsp. owariensis is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can be found in various herbal remedies, including teas, capsules, and ointments.
